title: Nicola Spring Coir Door Mat - 60 x 40cm - Hello - Pack of 1 - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Durable Coir Construction – Crafted from natural coir coconut fibres, this door mat offers exceptional strength and durability. Its stiff bristles efficiently remove dirt, dust, mud, and muck from the soles of your shoes, keeping your home clean.

Non-Slip PVC Backing – The non-slip black PVC backing traps moisture and water, protecting your interior carpets from spills and stains while preventing slippage in wet conditions, ensuring safety and cleanliness in your home.

Charming "Hello" Design – Featuring a beautiful, handwritten-style “Hello” message, this mat is designed to create a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Available in two sizes (40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm), it complements a variety of home decor styles.

Easy Maintenance – This doormat is simple to clean: just beat it while hanging outside with a sturdy broom handle, then brush through with water before laying flat to dry. Its low-maintenance design keeps it fresh and ready for use.

Indoor and Outdoor Versatility – Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, this mat adds personality to your front door, porch, or office entrance. Its versatile design ensures it fits beautifully in a variety of settings and environments.
description: Product description The range of Natural Coir Non-Slip Door Mats from Nicola Spring offers a quick and easy way to show off your personality, and create an inviting home environment for your guests right from their very first step inside. Crafted from natural coir coconut fibres, these welcome mats provide an innate strength and durability that is perfectly suited to brushing dirt, dust, mud and muck from the soles of your shoes. A non-slip PVC backing traps moisture and water, while keeping your interior carpets protected. Coming in two sizes - 40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm - this doormat comes adorned with a gorgeous, handwritten-style “Hello” message that is sure to feel at home in a wide variety of decor styles. To clean, simply beat while hanging outside with a sturdy broom handle, then brush through with a small amount of water before laying flat to dry. With the Nicola Spring collection of Natural Coir Non-Slip Welcome Mats, your door is always open. Shop the range today. Safety Warning Non-slip backing may not prevent slipping on wet surfaces. May cause allergic reactions in individuals sensitive to coconut fibers.
